description: Developed and executed performance tests in Kubernetes hosted in AWS EC2 services using k6, saving $100k in resource allocation and improving response performance from 10s to 50ms
Exported logs to AWS S3 buckets using AWS CloudWatch to monitor performance and availability from PostgreSQL databases, reducing downtime by 40%
Conducted cloud load testing with k6 framework for services up to 100k RPS and implemented CI/CD asynchronous pipelines for an online dealer auction platform
Analyzed New Relic results to provide optimal resource management for Kubernetes across multiple services, improving performance and cost optimization
Maintained application flow for medical claims and insurance policies — accepted into the prestigious YC Startup Batch in Summer 2021
Built features including user authentication, data visualization, and form validation using JavaScript
Deployed the application using Google Cloud Platform and Node.js with auto-scalable infrastructure handling up to 300k TPS
